name: Jep of Nox

sheet.name: Jep of Nox
sheet.background_story:
Current: Has entered the burrows on behalf of Gunther Wolfblade's party. As the keeper of Noxium Brew, most experienced with Grand Jester Concord and dawning Worm's Weight seems most fit to enter.

On behalf of Gunther explored The Church with the other Lost Pilgrims, survived both battles.

Keeper of Grand Jester Concord Tokens in Wolf's Party.

Affiliations: Curious about the Grand Jesters & the Worm.. Laughter & Death.
